nasb.text: But when they urged him until he was ashamed, he said, “Send.” They sent therefore fifty men; and they searched three days but did not find him.

esv.text: But when they urged him till he was ashamed, he said, “Send.” They sent therefore fifty men. And for three days they sought him but did not find him.

cnv.text: 他們懇求他，使他不好意思推辭，於是他說：“你們派人去吧。”他們就派出五十個人，尋覓了三天，仍然找不著。

ccb.text: 他们再三恳求，以利沙难以推辞，就让他们派人去了。他们派去了五十人，找了三天也没有找到。
